description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle has a long, cylindrical barrel with a standard front sight post and a carry handle integrated with the rear sight. The magazine is a detachable box type, seamlessly fitted into the lower receiver. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and heat dissipation, and the overall design is streamlined for both functionality and ease of use. The rifle's construction appears robust, likely utilizing a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight. Its visual profile is consistent with firearms commonly seen in law enforcement or military urban operations.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, carry handle, and ribbed handguard, featuring a detachable box magazine and standard iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and standard front sight.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel, handguard, and carry handle, with minimal detail visible on the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage of the rifle, including the magazine well and the lower receiver contours.
